list.loading: Ana loda tanadin ku na kanku…
list.title: Tanadin ku na kanku
list.description: Saita manufa da kwanan wata, mu kuma za mu bibiyi ci gaban ku. Kowace manufa tulu ce a cikin walat ɗin ku ɗaya, ba wani asusu daban ba.

frequency.label: Yawan ba da gudummawa
frequency.hint: Gudummawa na farawa da kaɗan don ƙirƙirar ɗabi'a sannan tana ƙaruwa a hankali har sai ka cimma manufar ka.

plan.daily: Fara da <0></0> yau sannan ka ƙara zuwa <1></1> cikin kwanaki {{count}}.
plan.weekly: Fara da <0></0> wannan mako sannan ka ƙara zuwa <1></1> cikin makonni {{count}}.
plan.monthly: Fara da <0></0> wannan wata sannan ka ƙara zuwa <1></1> cikin watanni {{count}}.

image.label: Hoto (na zaɓi)
image.hint: Ƙara hoton abin da kake yin tanadi domin sa don kiyaye burin da rai.

info.unallocated: A yanzu kana da <0></0> da ba a ware ba. Sanya shi ga wata manufa domin ci gaba da tanadin ka a kan turba.

detail.notFound: Ba mu sami wannan manufar ba.

deposit.title: Ƙara kuɗi
deposit.description: Matsar da kuɗi daga ma'aunin ku da ke akwai zuwa wannan rabo.
deposit.descriptionOnchain: Matsar da kuɗi daga ma'aunin ku da ke akwai zuwa ma'ajin wannan manufa da ke kan sarkar. Ajiya kyauta ce.

withdraw.title: Cire kuɗi
withdraw.feeNote: Ana ɗaukar kuɗin cirewa na {{fee}}% a kan sarkar. Kana samun adadin bayan an cire kuɗin.

plan.title: Shirin ba da gudummawa
plan.subtitle: {{cadence}} · yana ƙaruwa a hankali
plan.allDone: Ka kammala kowane mataki na shirin ka. 🎉

keepGoing.daily: Ci gaba kullum. Kimanin <0>kwanaki {{count}}</0> na gudummawa suka rage don cimma manufar ka.
keepGoing.weekly: Ci gaba mako-mako. Kimanin <0>makonni {{count}}</0> na gudummawa suka rage don cimma manufar ka.
keepGoing.monthly: Ci gaba wata-wata. Kimanin <0>watanni {{count}}</0> na gudummawa suka rage don cimma manufar ka.

vault.title: Ma'ajin kan sarkar
vault.description: Kuɗin da ka ware ana ajiye su a cikin wannan ma'aji a kan Monad. Ana ɗaukar kuɗin ladar yarjejeniya na {{fee}}% a kowane cirewa.

delete.title: Share manufa
delete.descEmpty: Wannan zai rufe manufar har abada.
delete.descWithBalance: Wannan zai mayar da cikakken ma'aunin {{amount}} zuwa kuɗin ka da ke akwai sannan ya rufe manufar.
delete.descWithFee: Wannan zai cire cikakken ma'aunin {{amount}} zuwa kuɗin ka da ke akwai (ban da kuɗin cirewa na {{fee}}%) sannan ya rufe manufar.

toast.streakDescription: Kyau, wannan ajiya tana ƙidaya ga jerin tanadin ka.

deposit.prompt: Walat ɗin ku na kanku ne. Haɗa shi don ka rattaba hannu kan ajiyar da kanka.

withdrawal.prompt: Walat ɗin ku na kanku ne. Haɗa shi don ka rattaba hannu kan cirewar da kanka.

errors.unavailable: Tanadin manufa a kan sarkar ba ya samuwa a wannan tsari.
errors.depositFailed: Ajiya ta kasa. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
errors.withdrawalFailed: Cirewa ta kasa. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
